---
pagetitle: "Projects — Daniel Regalado Cardoso"
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
toc: false
css: styles.css
---

::: {.section-container}

## Capstone Projects {.section-title}

::: {.section-subtitle}
Industry partnerships.
:::

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid building >}} AI for Equitable Public Transportation {#transit}

::: {.project-org-label}
Deloitte · University of Miami
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
Jan 2026 – Present
:::

Building predictive models integrating Census ACS, GTFS, and ArcGIS data to identify transit equity gaps in Miami-Dade County. Sprint-based development with GitHub issue tracking, SHAP-based interpretability, simulation models, and an interactive dashboard for equity-driven policy recommendations.

`Python` `SHAP` `GTFS` `ArcGIS` `Census ACS`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/CapstoneProject-AI-for-Equitable-Transportation){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} · [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/miami-transit-equity){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid robot >}} AI Scheduling Assistant {#bascom-palmer}

::: {.project-org-label}
UHealth Bascom Palmer Eye Institute · University of Miami
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
Sep 2025 – Present
:::

Built a multi-agent LLM chatbot using LangGraph, LangChain, and GPT-4 Turbo to automate patient scheduling across 100+ providers. Implemented RAG with ChromaDB, deterministic safety gates, confidence scoring, and real-time monitoring via LangSmith. Multi-node architecture with Microsoft Copilot Studio frontend.

`LangGraph` `LangChain` `GPT-4` `RAG` `ChromaDB` `Copilot Studio`
:::

:::

:::

<hr class="divider">

::: {.section-container}

## Featured Projects {.section-title}

::: {.section-subtitle}
Things I've built.
:::

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid database >}} Multi-Model SQL Agent with LLMOps {#sql-agent}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Fine-Tuning & LLMOps
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Multi-model SQL agent orchestrating three specialized fine-tuned LLMs: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B for SQL generation, Phi-3 Mini 3.8B for chart reasoning (knowledge-distilled), and DeepSeek Coder 1.3B for SVG rendering. Schema RAG over ChromaDB, DuckDB execution, Plotly fallback, and three public training datasets on the HuggingFace Hub.

`Qwen 2.5 Coder` `Phi-3` `DeepSeek` `Unsloth` `ChromaDB` `DuckDB` `LLMOps`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/sql-agent-llmops){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid microchip >}} MoE Backward Optimization (moesloth) {#moesloth}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Triton Kernels, Unsloth-inspired
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Research project applying Unsloth's hand-derived-backward + Triton-fusion methodology to Mixture-of-Experts. Targets sparse O(k) router backward, fused dispatch/combine with expert GEMMs, and LoRA-on-MoE selective grad accumulation. Validation against Megablocks, ScatterMoE, and DeepSeek-MoE on OLMoE and Mixtral.

`Triton` `PyTorch` `Mixture-of-Experts` `Unsloth` `Kernel Fusion`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/moesloth){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid heart-pulse >}} HDL Cholesterol Prediction {#hdl}

::: {.project-org-label}
ASA South Florida Data Challenge — Distinguished Achievement (Top 10%)
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Developed a CatBoost model on NHANES survey data achieving R² = 0.75 for predicting HDL cholesterol levels. Domain-guided feature engineering with SHAP analysis identified gender and waist circumference as top predictors. Presented at FIU Winner Showcase. Collaboration with Miguel Rocha.

`CatBoost` `SHAP` `NHANES` `Feature Engineering`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/hdl-cholesterol-prediction){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid chart-line >}} DiagBoostTS {#diagboost}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Python Library
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2025 – Present
:::

Iterative diagnostic boosting for time series forecasting. A systematic EDA → Stationarity → Decomposition → Features → Split → Model → Evaluate pipeline with editorial/minimal visual theme and modular architecture.

`Python` `Time Series` `XGBoost` `SARIMA` `Library Design`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/diagboost-ts){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid chart-bar >}} Product Sales Forecasting {#sales-forecasting}

::: {.project-org-label}
MSBA @ University of Miami
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

End-to-end time series forecasting of product sales — exploratory data analysis, 14 model families, and cross-validated model selection for optimal forecasting performance.

`Python` `Time Series` `Cross-Validation` `EDA`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/product-sales-forecasting){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid star >}} Yelp Recommendation & Churn Prediction {#yelp}

::: {.project-org-label}
MAS 651 — Deep Learning Final Project
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Recommendation system and churn prediction model for Tampa Bay businesses using Yelp data. Deep learning approaches for user behavior modeling and business analytics.

`Deep Learning` `Recommendation Systems` `Churn` `NLP`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/MAS651-Final-Project){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid truck >}} CanDi Supply Chain Network Design {#candi}

::: {.project-org-label}
MGT 642 — Supply Chain Analytics Final Project
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Supply chain network design and optimization for CanDi, applying analytical models for facility location, capacity planning, and logistics optimization.

`Supply Chain` `Optimization` `Network Design` `Analytics`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/CanDi-Supply-Chain-Design){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid file-lines >}} ATS Resume Optimizer {#ats-optimizer}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Live on HuggingFace Spaces
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Full-stack AI tool that analyzes resumes against job descriptions using a hybrid ML scoring system: 60% ATS keyword match (Llama 3.1-70B) + 40% semantic similarity (Sentence-Transformers). Generates an optimized, ATS-tailored resume with downloadable PDF.

`Llama 3.1-70B` `Sentence-Transformers` `Gradio` `HuggingFace` `NLP`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/ats-resume-optimizer){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} · [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/ats-resume-optimizer){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid language >}} MayaVoice LLM {#mayavoice}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Generative AI for Indigenous Languages
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Multilingual GenAI application for translation and conversation in Guatemalan Mayan languages. Bridges the gap between low-resource indigenous languages and modern AI through fine-tuned LLMs, preserving cultural heritage through technology.

`LLMs` `NLP` `Low-Resource Languages` `HuggingFace` `Gradio`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/mayavoice-llm){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} · [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/mayavoice){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid calculator >}} Maya Encoding {#maya-encoding}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Open-Source Python Library
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Maya-inspired vigesimal numerical encodings for machine learning. Scikit-learn compatible transformers that convert numerical features into base-20 representations inspired by the ancient Maya numeral system, offering a novel feature engineering approach.

`Python` `scikit-learn` `Feature Engineering` `Library Design`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/maya-encoding){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} · [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/maya-encoding-demo){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid atom >}} CounterFlow Neural Network {#counterflow}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project — Novel Architecture
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

A novel neural network architecture inspired by counter-current flow in chemical engineering unit operations. Applies principles of heat and mass transfer to information flow in deep learning, creating bidirectional feature exchange between parallel network streams.

`PyTorch` `Deep Learning` `Neural Architecture` `Chemical Engineering`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/counterflow-nn){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} · [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/counterflow-nn){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

:::

:::


::: {.section-container}

::: {.connect-section}

::: {.connect-heading}
Interested in collaborating?
:::

I'm always open to discussing new projects and opportunities.

::: {.connect-links}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-regalado-cardoso-81551b16b){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa solid envelope >}} dxr1491@miami.edu](mailto:dxr1491@miami.edu){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg target="_blank"}
:::

:::

:::
